mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM submission s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.submit_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND s.submit_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
